creator: Mark.Martinec@ijs.si
text:
Using the attached port I built the grafana6 under poudriere and
upgraded our grafana5 to grafana6. Everything looks good, thanks!


Robin Breathe writes:
> I have left the maintainer the same as for the other grafana* ports,
> swills@FreeBSD.org, but if Steve doesn't wish to take on this port
> then I am happy to take responsibility.

Checked my archives of FreeBSD mailing lists, and the latest post
I can find from swills is from November 2016. Perhaps the offer
by Robin should be gratefully accepted.
